message:
feat(fcp-async-core): add Lines, stdin/stdout bridges and migrate MCP stdio to async-core

Introduce asupersync-tokio-compat integration into fcp-async-core to
provide cancel-aware async I/O primitives that are runtime-agnostic.

- Add Lines<R> type with next_line() matching Tokio's API shape but
  backed by Asupersync's stream-based line reader.
- Add stdin() / stdout() factory functions bridging Tokio's raw I/O
  handles through the AsupersyncIo compatibility layer.
- Extend AsyncBufReadExt with a .lines() method.
- Migrate fwc serve-mcp stdio transport from direct tokio::io usage
  to fcp-async-core's runtime and I/O abstractions, decoupling the
  MCP server from a specific async runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
